Extract the table name from a VISUALISE clause's FROM, if present

Source: R/querychat_viz.R
extract_visualise_table.Rd

Looks only in the portion of the visual string before the first DRAW keyword, so FROM clauses inside DRAW (e.g., MAPPING x FROM other) are ignored.

Usage

extract_visualise_table(visual)

Arguments

visual

A ggsql VISUALISE string.

Value

The table name string (possibly quoted), or NULL if not present.

On this page
